# Leville.net

> Holiday accommodation rental service in Levi, Finnish Lapland. We offer apartments, chalets and cabins for 1–14 guests in the heart of Levi ski resort.

## Basic Info

- Website: https://leville.net
- Primary language: Finnish (fi)
- Supported languages: en, sv, de, es, fr, nl
- Contact email: info@leville.net
- Contact phone / WhatsApp: +358 44 131 3131
- Location: Levi, Kittilä, Finnish Lapland
- Booking platform: https://app.moder.fi/levillenet

## Main Sections

- [Accommodations](https://leville.net/majoitukset): All rental properties with availability search
- [Levi Guide](https://leville.net/levi): Destination info, activities and seasonal highlights
- [Northern Lights](https://leville.net/revontulet): Aurora borealis forecasts and tips
- [FAQ](https://leville.net/ukk): Frequently asked questions about stays
- [Booking Terms](https://leville.net/varausehdot): Terms and conditions
- [Contact](https://leville.net/yhteystiedot): Contact information

## Accommodation Categories

- **Skistar Apartments** — Modern studios & suites in Levi center (2–6 guests)
- **Front Slope Chalets** (Hiihtäjänkuja) — Spacious apartments with fireplace and slope-view sauna (4–8 guests)
- **Levi Glacier Apartments** — Alpine apartments at the foot of the slopes (6–10 guests)
- **Bear Lodge / Karhupirtti** — Traditional log cabin for large groups (up to 14 guests)
- **Other** — Platinum studios, Moonlight, Karhunvartija

## Guides & Articles

- Seasons: Winter, Spring, Summer, Autumn/Ruska
- Activities: Skiing, Cross-Country, Husky Safari, Snowmobile, Ice Fishing, Snowshoeing
- Travel: How to get to Levi, Getting around, Levi without a car, Restaurants & services
- Practical: Winter clothing, Heating systems, Finnish sauna, Fireplace instructions
- Comparisons: Levi vs Ylläs vs Ruka, Levi vs Rovaniemi
- Prices, Lapland Glossary, Christmas in Lapland

## Full Knowledge Base

For comprehensive information including appliance instructions, FAQ answers, activity details, and complete route map, see:
- [llms-full.txt](https://leville.net/llms-full.txt)
